title: Slovakian Smoky Casserole with Xenial Twist
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired casserole with smoky flavors and a xenial twist. Perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the xenial and cook until lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, mix together the Slovakian cheese and smoky sauce.
In a large baking dish, combine the bread, cooked xenial mixture, and cheese mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
